title: A Doctrine of Shadows
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A CIA linguist decoding a dead diplomat's encrypted journal realizes the coup she helped orchestrate in West Africa was a decoy for a much larger operation aimed at the Hague.
long_description: A CIA linguist decoding a dead diplomat's encrypted journal realizes the coup she helped orchestrate in West Africa was a decoy for a much larger operation aimed at the Hague.
